tools.name: apps.createApp
tools.description: Creates a new Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.createBackendEnvironment
tools.description: Creates a new backend environment for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.createBranch
tools.description: Creates a new branch for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.createDeployment
tools.description: Creates a deployment for a manually deployed Amplify app. Manually deployed apps are not connected to a repository.

tools.name: apps.createDomainAssociation
tools.description: Creates a new domain association for an Amplify app. This action associates a custom domain with the Amplify app

tools.name: apps.createWebhook
tools.description: Creates a new webhook on an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.deleteApp
tools.description: Deletes an existing Amplify app specified by an app ID.

tools.name: apps.deleteBackendEnvironment
tools.description: Deletes a backend environment for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.deleteBranch
tools.description: Deletes a branch for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.deleteDomainAssociation
tools.description: Deletes a domain association for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.deleteJob
tools.description: Deletes a job for a branch of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.generateAccessLogs
tools.description: Returns the website access logs for a specific time range using a presigned URL.

tools.name: apps.getApp
tools.description: Returns an existing Amplify app by appID.

tools.name: apps.getBackendEnvironment
tools.description: Returns a backend environment for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.getBranch
tools.description: Returns a branch for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.getDomainAssociation
tools.description: Returns the domain information for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.getJob
tools.description: Returns a job for a branch of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.listApps
tools.description: Returns a list of the existing Amplify apps.

tools.name: apps.listArtifacts
tools.description: Returns a list of artifacts for a specified app, branch, and job.

tools.name: apps.listBackendEnvironments
tools.description: Lists the backend environments for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.listBranches
tools.description: Lists the branches of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.listDomainAssociations
tools.description: Returns the domain associations for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.listJobs
tools.description: Lists the jobs for a branch of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.listWebhooks
tools.description: Returns a list of webhooks for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.startDeployment
tools.description: Starts a deployment for a manually deployed app. Manually deployed apps are not connected to a repository.

tools.name: apps.startJob
tools.description: Starts a new job for a branch of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.stopJob
tools.description: Stops a job that is in progress for a branch of an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.updateApp
tools.description: Updates an existing Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.updateBranch
tools.description: Updates a branch for an Amplify app.

tools.name: apps.updateDomainAssociation
tools.description: Creates a new domain association for an Amplify app.

tools.name: artifacts.getArtifactUrl
tools.description: Returns the artifact info that corresponds to an artifact id.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of tags for a specified Amazon Resource Name (ARN).

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Tags the resource with a tag key and value.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Untags a resource with a specified Amazon Resource Name (ARN).

tools.name: webhooks.deleteWebhook
tools.description: Deletes a webhook.

tools.name: webhooks.getWebhook
tools.description: Returns the webhook information that corresponds to a specified webhook ID.

tools.name: webhooks.updateWebhook
tools.description: Updates a webhook.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
